prompt: Fetch the content from 'https://www.swerk-wue.de/bamberg/essen-trinken/mensen-speiseplaene/mensa-feldkirchenstrasse-bamberg/menu' and extract the text between 'Gerichte' and 'Beilagen'
notes: Core fetch+extract pattern. URL and markers must appear as literals.

prompt: Check the battery level and show an alert
notes: Basic device action — verifies @variable assignment and alert.

prompt: Fetch the contents of 'https://example.com' and show them
notes: Simple fetch. URL must be a literal, not prompted.

prompt: Read what is on the clipboard and show it
notes: Clipboard read — no user input needed.

prompt: Get the current weather and show temperature and condition
notes: Weather pattern — two getWeatherDetail calls expected.

prompt: Send a message to Mom saying 'On my way'
notes: Message with literal recipient and text from the prompt.
App bundle ID must be correct for Podcasts.

prompt: Pick a random city from New York, Tokyo, London, Sydney and show it
notes: List literal + getRandomItem. Must not use JS Math.random.

prompt: Run the shell command 'echo Hello' and show the output
notes: macOS shell — result assigned to @variable before show.
Regression: model must NOT ask the user for the URL via prompt().
Regression: every variable must have the @ sigil. 'url = ...' is wrong.
